message:
chore: bump GH Actions versions and update dependencies

GH Actions:
- actions/checkout v4 -> v6
- actions/upload-artifact v4 -> v7
- actions/download-artifact v4 -> v8

Cargo dependencies (via cargo update):
- asupersync 0.2.5 -> 0.2.7
- rich_rust 0.2.0 -> 0.2.1
- chrono 0.4.43 -> 0.4.44
- redis 1.0.4 -> 1.0.5
- toml 1.0.3 -> 1.0.6
- getrandom 0.4.1 -> 0.4.2
- quote 1.0.44 -> 1.0.45
- syn 2.0.116 -> 2.0.117

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,16 +24,16 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Checkout asupersync
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
           repository: Dicklesworthstone/asupersync
           path: deps/asupersync
 
       - name: Checkout rich_rust
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
           repository: Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust
           path: deps/rich_rust
